title: Identity documents
description: The identity documents you need to apply for a TFN, ABN or register for GST and who can certify your original documents.
keywords: identity documents, proof of identity, copies of documents, certified copies, POI

child_links.title: Copies of identity documents for applicants in Australia
child_links.description: How applicants in Australia get certified identity documents to apply for a TFN, ABN or register for GST.

child_links.title: Copies of identity documents for applicants outside Australia
child_links.description: Check the certified identity documents you need to apply for a TFN, ABN or register for GST as a non-resident.

child_links.title: Proof of identity – applicants outside Australia
child_links.description: Identity documents you need to apply for a TFN as an individual or business applicant residing outside of Australia.
